$comment: C11/C23 6.4.4.4 char16_t constraint witness (UCN form): u'\U0001F600' names U+1F600, a supplementary-plane code point - but ONE char16_t holds ONE code unit (a surrogate PAIR is two). The char path is UNCHANGED by the string surrogate-pair work: it FAILS LOUD with H_WideCharValueUnrepresentable (unsuppressable), the UCN analog of utf16_char_astral_error. Red-on-disable: drop the U16 range check in decodeWideCharCodepoint and this compiles emitting a wrong unit.
